name: 外冷內熱殘障霸總
name_en: Cold exterior warm interior disabled CEO
description: Tristan失明後被家族邊緣化，表面冷漠、對妻子立規矩，實則細膩敏銳（靠氣味辨人、靠聽覺判斷牛排熟度），在感情中逐漸展現溫柔與深情。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: But I can smell. You have a very distinct scent. / Yours is overcooked. How can you tell? I can hear it. / I never would have stopped looking.
examples.context: Tristan失明後被家族邊緣化，表面冷漠、對妻子立規矩，實則細膩敏銳（靠氣味辨人、靠聽覺判斷牛排熟度），在感情中逐漸展現溫柔與深情。
